item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Fully Custom Desk-PC: A Carpenters Masterpiece
item.description:
Custom watercooled pc in a wooden "enclosure"
Backside neatly cable managed
First test of the build, one LED strip dead
Close up of the system
Underside of the table
Top with cutout for the PC
3D printed grill with dustfilter, looking from above
Ait outtake, only grill
Intake with dustfilter
Frontside drawer
PC in the table with the glass lifted and the transportation handles mounted to the "enclosure"
Left side under the drawer is the power button
Opened drawer with wooden drawer slides running in ball bearings
Table frame with fully detachable connection for easier transportation
Sideview
Top with PC turned on
Finished build with peripherals
item.dc:creator: HerrCoroni

item.title: Pay the ferryman
item.description: To help with the confusion. Death and the ferryman are two different entities. Death collects the souls the ferryman ferrys the souls to there final destination. Think like the train conductor.

item.title: If you make a nostril sound, you have to hit the green arrow thingy. FRIDAY meme dump. (Hold on, the weekend is almost here)
item.description:
1
2. HE HE
3. "Look at those peasants below"
4
5. Just to sport refs going on a date
6. Me, a rulebraker (colorized)
7. ARE YE READY FOR THE GREAT GOOSE WAR
8. Building site manager annoyed about how bad the fence has been installed
9. Average Idiot
10. Me: "I never, get picked in sports, WTF?" Also Me:
11. Norm on Who Wants To Be A Millionaire
12. That's a lot of energy for an energy efficiency joke
13
14. How accurate is this?
15. Thanks to the 2,5 people (hi, Mom,Dad and dog) who made it to the end of this dump! When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with more chaos and a lot more questionable decisions. Here is a scene from the game I've just completed! Anyway, it would make my day if you could check out our game on Steam and give it a wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Amazon seems to have keyed into something about my shopping history…
item.description: And it’s relevant to THT! Edit: OPE! We hit Most Viral! Oh nooooo now I’ve gotta buy these things and post a photo wearing all of it (and a top, perverts). Stay tuned! Edit 2: All credit to my favorite @EmmAhGerd for suggesting I post the screenshot. She said she assumed it was a meme.

item.dc:creator: mondoobi

item.title: Revenge served right
item.description: Víctor explained that his behavior was caused by his father’s absence at the graduation ceremony. According to the young man, his father, who had recently been operated on, was sent by the school to look for more ice. Upon returning, he was not allowed to enter the event again, being forced to observe the graduation from a hole in the door. Víctor said that, when he realized the situation, he just wanted to pick up his diploma and leave. However, frustration and anger led him to insult the director, as shown in the video. https://mvsnoticias.com/tendencias/2024/7/24/indignacion-en-tiktok-joven-arremete-contra-director-en-su-graduacion-video-649577.html
item.dc:creator: l0calh0st

item.title: 90s arcade carpet sweater I designed!
item.description: It comes cropped and full length My friend is modeling it here, but she is still a cutie patootie no less. It’s available to order here! https://www.backerkit.com/c/projects/echonyx/Timeless-Threads
item.dc:creator: hoodbobthugpants

item.title: I... I'm lost.
item.description: I don't want to tell anyone I know. I'm quite scared. Doctor's appointment on Monday to get more details. His quote, "I hate working when I'm dying." Hmmmm. Fuck. FP Edit: Thank you for the support and well-wishes, truly. It helps a bit to compartmentalize my emotions within this app for now so I can be calm for him and the kids and finish my workday from bed. His appetite has been bad for a while. First go-around was stomach cancer, I don't have details about physiology for this relapse until Monday. But if anyone has any recommendations on solutions that might get him eating a little bit more regularly, they would be greatly appreciated. Peace, yall. Fuck cancer.
item.dc:creator: TheGoudaKaramazov
